name: Zesty Sloppy Joes
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces Thick and zesty tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan or Dutch oven over medium heat, brown the ground beef and onion.
2. Add the green pepper and cook, stirring for about 5 minutes, until the meat is fully cooked through.
3. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients: tomato soup, thick and zesty tomato sauce, additional tomato sauce, brown sugar, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, prepared mustard, dry mustard, chili powder, and garlic salt.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
6. Reduce the heat to low and cover the pan. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve the Sloppy Joes on hamburger buns.
